sequence.objective: Anchor search demand and create the source article for repurposing.
sequence.successSignal: Search impressions, checklist clicks, inquiry clicks

sequence.objective: Translate the blog into an executive insight for B2B credibility.
sequence.assetSpec: Text post or PDF-style document carousel

sequence.objective: Create a saveable checklist from the anchor article.
Turn one checklist gap into a short authority signal.
sequence.successSignal: Average watch time, replays, profile taps

sequence.objective: Test a searchable question in short-form video.
sequence.assetSpec: 9:16 vertical video, spoken answer, pinned checklist comment

sequence.objective: Test a direct warning hook with faster pacing.
sequence.assetSpec: 9:16 vertical video, large captions, checklist overlay

sequence.objective: Convert the message into a referral-friendly business-owner summary.
sequence.assetSpec: Readable image or link preview plus phone CTA

sequence.objective: Build deeper trust with a structured explanation and chapters.
sequence.successSignal: Watch time, returning viewers, checklist clicks
